title: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.Memoize
description: Memoize enables caching for the Outputs of the template.

cache.description: Cache sets and configures the kind of cache

key.description: Key is the key to use as the caching key

maxAge.description: MaxAge is the maximum age (e.g. "180s", "24h") of an entry that is still considered valid. If an entry is older than the MaxAge, it will be ignored.
